case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FLORES, MARCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO $3,989.80 PRINCIPAL, $25.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,015.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,989.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $225.32 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO
